text:
This article is about the Evangelion from Stage Evangelion Beyond stage play. For the Evangelion from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: Battle Orchestra, see Evangelion Unit-α.

 is an Evangelion appearing in the Stage Evangelion Beyond stage play. It was piloted by Toma Kano.

Profile

Attribute: Wind 
Color: Copper Theatre cocoon Evangelion Beyond p.40 

The development of the Evangelion dates back to a project that was undertaken by Saneyuki Kano as chief executive officer before the founding of MENSCH. In addition to previous research on the used in that project, development proceeded based on knowledge gained from investigating the craters that had formed in the disaster area. Development was extremely difficult, including securing pilots, but after 11 years, Evangelion α was completed. Theatre cocoon Evangelion Beyond p.40

Stage Evangelion Beyond
